chat.welcomeSubtitle: Ask me anything about MHFA training, resources, and support.

instructor: How do I manage my upcoming MHFA courses?
What are the invoicing guidelines for instructors?
Where can I find the Instructor Policy Handbook?
internal_staff: What are the current operational guidelines?
How do I access admin guidance for training support?
learner: What is Mental Health First Aid training?
How do I get my MHFA certification?
Where can I find additional MHFA resources?

leadCapture.title: Stay connected
leadCapture.subtitle: Share your details so we can follow up with resources tailored to your interests.
leadCapture.successMessage: We've received your information and will be in touch soon.

escalation.title: Connect with support
escalation.subtitle: Would you like to connect with a support team member? Provide your email and we'll follow up.
escalation.successMessage: Your request has been submitted. A support team member will follow up.
